title: WebDAV
summary: Discover a WebDAV endpoint via fuzzing and exploit unsafe HTTP methods to bypass file upload restrictions and achieve RCE.

title: Fittest
summary: Defeat a vulnerable smart‑contract creature by reducing its life points and looting its balance using a single strong attack.

title: Space
summary: Reconstruct hidden coordinates from a distance matrix using MDS and PCA to reveal the flag embedded in 2D point clouds.
